description_long: This is a modern two-story house with a flat roof and a minimalist geometric design. The front features a driveway with a yellow car, a double garage, and a recessed main entryway. Large floor-to-ceiling windows dominate the rear facade, overlooking a spacious patio with a swimming pool, sun loungers, and an outdoor dining area. The exterior is primarily finished in smooth white and gray surfaces, with clean lines and minimal ornamentation. The house includes multiple balconies and terraces, providing ample outdoor living space. The overall structure is boxy and open, emphasizing transparency and connection between indoor and outdoor areas.
description: A modern, two-story house with flat roofs, large windows, a driveway, and a backyard pool with outdoor seating.
description_view_0: Front view showing the driveway, double garage, main entryway, and a yellow car parked outside.
description_view_1: Side/rear view highlighting the backyard with a swimming pool, sun loungers, and outdoor dining area.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying expansive floor-to-ceiling windows, the pool, and outdoor living spaces.
description_view_3: Side/front view showing the entryway, driveway, and partial view of the backyard amenities.
attribute_entryway_design: Recessed main entry with a flat overhang, minimal steps, and a double garage adjacent to the door
